basicDetails.schemeName: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance in the Form of Grant-In-Aid to Bhajani/ Choir/ Cultural Group/ Institutions for Purchase of Musical Instruments

schemeContent.briefDescription: The Scheme Provides Financial Assistance in the form of a Grant-In-Aid to Bhajani/ Choir/ Cultural Group/ Institutions for the Purchase of Musical Instruments. The Scheme is implemented by the Directorate of Art and Culture.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
"Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance in the Form of Grant-In-Aid to Bhajani/ Choir/ Cultural Group/ Institutions for Purchase of Musical Instruments" implemented by the Directorate of Art and Culture, Government of Goa, provides financial assistance in the form of Grant-In-Aid to the Bhajani/ Choir/ Cultural Groups /Institutions for the purchase of Musical Instruments of their choice.
> **Objectives** 1. To encourage and sustain the Bhajani Mandals, Choir Groups, and Cultural Troupes who contribute to a great extent to the preservation of cultural heritage with their cultural and musical performances. 1. To give financial support to organizations/institutions for the promotion and preservation of age-old culture. 1. To promote local talent and to promote local cultural troupes.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
1. Lumpsum grants / financial assistance to the maximum extent of ₹ 15,000/- per Group/ Institution for the purchase of Musical Instruments only.

**NOTE:** The Government / Department may restrict the number of groups/institutions in each category according to the availability of the funds.

children.text: "Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance in the Form of Grant-In-Aid to Bhajani/ Choir/ Cultural Group/ Institutions for Purchase of Musical Instruments" implemented by the Directorate of Art and Culture, Government of Goa, provides financial assistance in the form of Grant-In-Aid to the Bhajani/ Choir/ Cultural Groups /Institutions for the purchase of Musical Instruments of their choice.
Objectives

To encourage and sustain the Bhajani Mandals, Choir Groups, and Cultural Troupes who contribute to a great extent to the preservation of cultural heritage with their cultural and musical performances.
To give financial support to organizations/institutions for the promotion and preservation of age-old culture.
To promote local talent and to promote local cultural troupes.
Lumpsum grants / financial assistance to the maximum extent of ₹ 15,000/- per Group/ Institution for the purchase of Musical Instruments only.
NOTE:
The Government / Department may restrict the number of groups/institutions in each category according to the availability of the funds.
Step 1:
The interested applicant should visit the Directorate Of Art & Culture, Government of Goa, 5th Floor, Shram Shakti Bhavan, Panaji, Patto, Panaji, Goa - 403001
Step 2:
Take a print of the
proforma
of the application form, or request a hard copy from the concerned authority.
Step 3:
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest if required).
Step 4:
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the
ACO-II, Directorate of Art & Culture, Phone: 0832-2404623, Email: aco3-dac.goa@nic.in

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** The interested applicant should visit the Directorate Of Art & Culture, Government of Goa, 5th Floor, Shram Shakti Bhavan, Panaji, Patto, Panaji, Goa - 403001
**Step 2:** Take a print of the [proforma](https://www.goa.gov.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/Grant-in-Aid-to-Purchase-Musical-Instrument-2022-23-online-form.pdf) of the application form, or request a hard copy from the concerned authority.
**Step 3:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest if required).
**Step 4:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the **ACO-II, Directorate of Art & Culture, Phone: 0832-2404623, Email: aco3-dac.goa@nic.in**

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The Mandal/ Group/ Institution/ Troupe should consist of at least a minimum of 10 members.
1. The Mandal/ Group/ Institution/ Troupe should be conducting regular musical performances like bhajans, choir singing, folk performances etc.
1. The Mandal/ Group/ Institution/ Troupe should not already have received the benefits of this scheme.

children.text: The Mandal/ Group/ Institution/ Troupe should consist of at least a minimum of 10 members.
The Mandal/ Group/ Institution/ Troupe should be conducting regular musical performances like bhajans, choir singing, folk performances etc.
The Mandal/ Group/ Institution/ Troupe should not already have received the benefits of this scheme.
